decisions.decision: Performance must be audited before animation work begins
decisions.rationale: Polishing on broken repaint model bakes jank in

decisions.decision: Google Play closed testing 14-day gate starts day 1 of Phase 5
decisions.rationale: 14-day minimum with 12 testers is critical path for launch

decisions.decision: Only 3 new packages needed (flutter_native_splash, confetti, share_plus)
decisions.rationale: Existing stack covers everything else; minimal dependency footprint

decisions.decision: TileThemes Hive/regex coupling is the top jank risk
decisions.rationale: ~960 ops/sec at 60fps with 16 tiles; must fix before animations

next_action: Run /gsd:discuss-phase 1 or /gsd:plan-phase 1 to start Phase 1 (Performance Audit)
context_notes: Milestone v1.2 Launch Ready is fully initialized. All planning artifacts are committed. The app is feature-complete at v1.1.0 — this milestone is about polish, optimization, and store preparation for first public release on iOS and Android. Research identified TileThemes reactive refactor and BLoC buildWhen guards as key architecture fixes needed before animation work.
